description: Texas Ventures Acquisition III Corp does not have significant operations. It focuses on effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses in any business or industry. The company was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Mountainside, New Jersey.
